title: KV Cache
description: KV Cache documents overview material for KV Cache in the science domain. It is classified as an entity page for the model-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights KV Cache, and KV Cache size, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include neural network, large language model, kvcache, science, and llm, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is science / llm / kvcache / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
